verdict.body: Nice work overall. Three findings — one suggestion, one nitpick, one praise.

comments.label: suggestion
comments.subject: Extract this repeated pattern into a helper
comments.discussion: The same null-check-then-transform appears on lines 42, 67, and 91. A small utility function would reduce duplication.

comments.label: issue (blocking)
comments.subject: Missing error handling for network failure
comments.discussion: fetchUser() can throw on network errors but there's no try/catch or .catch() handler. This will crash the request handler.

comments.label: praise
comments.subject: Clean separation of concerns in this module
